name: Cambodia
headline: Cambodia ROTATION CONFIRMATION at 12.5 / Critical. No new material evidence dated May 14-15. Carry-forward: ongoing authoritarian governance under Hun Manet; cyber-scam trafficking operations (tens of thousands of forced laborers); restricted civil society. Rotation-cycle confirmation; no score change. Note: scanner referenced composite 7.5 — canonical state per index file is 12.5; rotation-state may carry pre-update value.

BND.rationale: Sustained. Cyber-scam trafficking BND-dimension floor-adjacent evidence carry-over.

evidence.summary: Ongoing authoritarian governance under Hun Manet; cyber-scam trafficking operations (tens of thousands of forced laborers); restricted civil society. Carry-forward from May 13-14 rotation.

keyEvidence: No new material evidence dated May 14-15.
Rotation confirmation: cyber-scam trafficking, authoritarian governance, restricted civil society — carry-forward.
Index-file canonical state 12.5 (scanner referenced 7.5 — discrepancy noted).
rationale: Rotation confirmation. No new material evidence in window; carry-forward state sustained. Note discrepancy: scanner referenced composite 7.5; index file shows 12.5. The 12.5 is the canonical state per countries.json. Math: (1.5*8)/8 = 1.5 → ((1.5-1)/4)*100 = 12.5.
boundaryWatchResolution: Not a boundary case. Composite 12.5 sits in central Critical band (0-20), 7.5pt above floor (0) and 8.5pt below Critical/Developing boundary (20/21).

math_check.math_hygiene_flag: Scanner referenced composite 7.5; index-file canonical is 12.5. Inter-source discrepancy of 5.0pt; rotation-state vs index-file audit required.
math_check.validator_check: Math clean for index-file canonical state. Rotation confirmation.
